whatWasImplemented: Playwright spec e2e/responses-plus-escalation.spec.ts with 5 tests covering VAL-CROSS-006. Seeds a keyword custom_response ('price' → 'Our pricing is $49/mo.') and a turn_count=3 escalation rule, then simulates widget chat via POST /api/chat/session + GET /api/chat/stream?sid=... The canned path of /api/chat/stream emits the raw response text with the PENDING_ACTION_SENTINEL (U+001E) + pending_action JSON trailer when escalation fires — proving the matcher short-circuits the RAG path while the escalation runtime still evaluates. A follow-up POST /api/leads with source=escalation is verified to land with source=escalation in the leads table scoped to the seeded site_id.

verification.testsRun: pnpm exec playwright test e2e/responses-plus-escalation.spec.ts — 5/5 passing (15.0s)

manualChecks.action: Seed keyword response + turn_count=3 escalation, POST chat/session message="what's the price?" history=[]
manualChecks.expected: Stream body contains canned text, no PENDING_ACTION_SENTINEL (turn 1 < 3)

manualChecks.action: POST chat/session message="and the price?" history=[2 user-assistant turns] so userMessageCount=3
POST /api/leads {site_key, email, source:'escalation'} after escalation surfaced
manualChecks.expected: 201 success; leads row persisted with source='escalation' and site_id=<seeded>
manualChecks.observed: Lead row present with matching source + site_id.

manualChecks.action: Message 'help me with price' with keyword-type escalation rule on 'help'
manualChecks.expected: Canned response text + sentinel with via='keyword', action='ask_email'

manualChecks.action: Two keyword response rules (priority 1 and 99) both match 'price'
manualChecks.observed: Only higher-priority response present in stream body.
